issues.description: RevealFromHand action structure incorrect. Should use a conditional gate (thenActions) at the trigger level, not nested inside RevealFromHand. The reveal is a cost/condition, not a separate action.
Missing TurnCount condition. '[Once Per Turn]' activation limit must be encoded as condition with TurnCount constraint.
PowerBoost action missing required condition check. The boost only applies 'if revealed' — conditional logic must guard the PowerBoost.
